description: Style NoteTaking a traditional design and giving it a modern twist is what makes esprit watches timeless timepieces. Contemporary and trendy, this is an affordable timepiece with an exquisite design that highlights your individuality.Product DetailsCase style: Stainless steel round caseDial style: White dial with silver handsStrap style: Steel strap with a butterfly claspFeatures: 3-faced multifunctional display, branding on the dial and screw to reset timeWater resistantSizeCase diameter: 43 mmCase thickness: 5 mm
